_comment: Copy this file to config/models/custom/models.json to override the default models.
_usage: Entries with an 'id' matching models.json will override that entry. New 'id' values are appended. **Please note that this translator is not yet compatible with OpenAI's o1 / o3 / GPT-5 models.**
_pricing_note: Add a 'pricing' object to enable token cost estimation. Rates are in USD per 1,000 tokens. Omit 'pricing' entirely if the cost is unknown or not applicable.
